steps.title: Identify the logical shift
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a general claim: bacteria-based cleaning has achieved “impressive overall” results. The second sentence provides a specific instance: these particular bacterial strains have proven more effective than traditional chemical methods. The signal is that the second sentence explains or exemplifies the first—it moves from general observation to concrete evidence.

steps.title: Select the transition word
steps.content: “In many cases” qualifies and explains the overall results. It says: The overall results are impressive, and in many cases, this is because these strains are more effective than traditional methods. However signals false contrast; As a result points causality backwards; Additionally just stacks two facts instead of showing explanatory relationship. That matches choice B — B is correct.
